---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(brms)
library(tidyverse)
library(BayesianId)

data(mtcars)
data("epilepsy")
```

```{r}
fit1 <- brm(
  count ~ zAge + zBase + Trt,
  data = epilepsy, family = negbinomial(),
  prior = prior(normal(0, 1), class = b),
  save_all_pars = TRUE,
  refresh = 0
)
summary(fit1)

# model without the treatment effect
fit2 <- brm(
  count ~ zAge + zBase,
  data = epilepsy, family = negbinomial(),
  prior = prior(normal(0, 1), class = b),
  save_all_pars = TRUE,
  refresh = 0
)
summary(fit2)

# compute the bayes factor
bayes_factor(fit1, fit2)
```


```{r}
fit1 <- brm_jzs(
  count ~ zAge + zBase + Trt,
  data = epilepsy, family = negbinomial()
)
```

```{r}
inc_tests(fit1)
```

```{r}
foo = data.frame("p(β≠0)" = rep(0, 3), check.names = FALSE)
#names(foo)[1] = expression("p(β≠0)")
foo
```
